name: Vacherin Glace Au Kirsch
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk the egg whites and cream of tartar until stiff peaks form.
2. Gradually add the granulated sugar, continuing to whisk until glossy meringue forms.
3. Stir in the vanilla extract and lemon peel.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
5. Bake at 250°F (120°C) for about 15-20 minutes or until crisp.
6. Allow to cool completely before serving.
